body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-40861", "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-59", "name": "Improper Link Resolution Before File Access ('Link Following')"}], "description": "A Dag author could either (a) create a symlink under their task's log directory pointing to an arbitrary file readable by the API server process (read-path attack — e.g. `/etc/passwd` or `airflow.cfg`) or (b) supply a `task_id` containing `..` sequences accepted by the Task SDK's `KEY_REGEX` (write-path attack), and in both cases the FileTaskHandler resolves the log path outside the configured `base_log_folder`, leaking or overwriting arbitrary files. Only affects deployments where the worker log folder is shared with the API server. Users are advised to upgrade to `apache-airflow` 3.2.2 or later. As a defense-in-depth mitigation, deploy the worker and API server with separate log volumes so that worker-controlled paths cannot reach the API server's filesystem.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00665, "percentile": 0.47509}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-89cj-xrpx-j79m", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-09T20:53:56Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-89cj-xrpx-j79m", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-89cj-xrpx-j79m"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-40861"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-01T09:16:17Z", "published_at": "2026-06-01T09:31:13Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40861", "https://github.com/apache/airflow/pull/65325", "https://lists.apache.org/thread/823334db2559xjlwt59gpzjz47thnscl", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/05/31/1", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/apache-airflow/PYSEC-2026-181.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-89cj-xrpx-j79m"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/apache/airflow", "summary": "Apache Airflow has a Link Following issue", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-09T20:53:57Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-89cj-xrpx-j79m", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.2.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "apache-airflow"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.2.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Apache Airflow has a Link Following issue
